[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111111 a
1 1000111001 5
2 0101010101 5
3 1010111110 7
4 1101010101 6
5 1101011110 7

7 1011101110 7
